# Load one H&N cohort for within-cohort analysis

```{r load-dataset}
TARGET.scDiffComs <- load.dataset.scDiffComs(TARGET_DATASET)
TARGET.malignant <- lapply(
  TARGET.scDiffComs,
  filter.scDiffCom.cci_table_detected.for.malignant,
  malignant_celltype = MALIGNANT_TYPE
)

n_before <- sum(vapply(TARGET.malignant, nrow, integer(1)))
TARGET.malignant <- filter_unknown_celltypes_list(TARGET.malignant)
n_after <- sum(vapply(TARGET.malignant, nrow, integer(1)))

message(sprintf(
  "%s: %d genes loaded; %d \u2192 %d malignant DE rows after unknown-celltype filter",
  TARGET_DATASET, length(TARGET.malignant), n_before, n_after
))

if (!GENE_OF_INT %in% names(TARGET.malignant)) {
  warning(GENE_OF_INT, " not in loaded genes — boxplot section may fail.")
}
```
